product: Prevalent AI — Cybersecurity Risk & Exposure Management Platform
standard_plan_note: Keep total fetched JSON under 15KB per session. Fetch only the modules listed in routing[] for your task type.

implementation_files.note: JSON modules describe rules and tokens. These MD files contain the actual verbatim HTML/CSS/JS to copy — always fetch them for build tasks.
must_copy_verbatim: Shell HTML template — full <style> block, full <script> block including shellNavToggle()
Chart JS functions — buildVerticalBarChart, buildLineChart, buildMultiLineChart, buildDonutChart, buildStackedBarChart
Tooltip JS — showChartTooltip, positionChartTooltip, hideChartTooltip + <div id='chart-tooltip'>

rules: Use CSS variables only — never hardcode hex or px values inline.
Spacing: 4pt grid only — 4, 8, 12, 16, 20, 24, 32, 48px. Off-scale values are bugs.
Every interactive element needs hover, active, focus, and disabled states.
Never modify the navigation pattern without design approval.
Always use a defined shell — never invent new page layouts.
Every new component file must be registered in context.json modules.
